_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in your API keys. All keys can also be set as environment variables.
_newsapi_note: Get free key at https://newsapi.org/register (100 req/day). Or set NEWSAPI_KEY env var.
newsapi_query: cybersecurity OR CVE OR vulnerability OR ransomware OR "data breach" OR "ethical hacking"
_nvd_note: Optional. Register at https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/request-an-api-key for higher rate limits.
_caption_note: Options: 'template' (offline, always works) | 'ai' (requires claude_api_key or hf_api_token)
_claude_note: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var or fill here. Uses claude-haiku for cost efficiency.
_image_note: Options: 'placeholder' (PIL only, CPU) | 'remote' (HuggingFace Stable Diffusion API)
_brand_note: Path to your index.html for live brand token extraction. Defaults to BRAND dict if missing.
